events.content: Accepted PR 929 review fixes: Accepted PR 929 review fixes

raw.question: Accepted PR 929 review fixes
raw.reasoning: The per-agent ordering concern was valid because independent HTTP and websocket handlers could enqueue PTY writes concurrently. I added a broker-side per-agent serializer shared by POST and websocket input, validated SDK numeric options, and documented binary frames/options/error handling.

retrospective.summary: Addressed PR #929 review feedback: serialized PTY input per agent, validated stream option bounds, and documented binary frames, options, and error handling.
